zh.Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Ki: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾利卡頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton於1463年6月3日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾利卡頓時，他的父親Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton22歲，母親Catherine Douglas21歲。他和Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart至少有1個女兒。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

zh-hans.Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Ki: 英国苏格兰艾斯爾利卡頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton于1463年6月3日出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾利卡頓时，他的父亲Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton22岁，母亲Catherine Douglas21岁。他和Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart至少有1个女儿。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德享年50岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton was born on 3 June 1463, in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton, was 22 and his mother, Catherine Douglas, was 21. He had at least 1 daughter with Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart. He died on 9 September 1513, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Branxton, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton est né le 3 juin 1463, à Riccarton, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Catherine Douglas, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton am 3. Juni 1463 in Riccarton, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton 22 und seine Mutter Catherine Douglas 21. Er hatte mit Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in Branxton, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton è nato il il 3 giugno 1463 nel Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Douglas, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Branxton, Northumberland, England.

ja.Riccarton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Ki: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアリクカートン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccartonが1463年6月3日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアリクカートンで生まれた時，父Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccartonは22歳，母Catherine Douglasは21歳であった。彼はSibilla Elizabeth Cathcartとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで50歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton(이)가 1463년 6월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 릭카턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Douglas(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.3 June 1463–9 September 1513: 3 de junho de 1463–9 de setembro de 1513
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton nasceu em 3 de junho de 1463, em Riccarton, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Douglas, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton родился 3 июня 1463 г. в местности риккартон, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Douglas, 21. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.3 June 1463–9 September 1513: 3 de junio de 1463–9 de septiembre de 1513
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wallace 13th of Riccarton nació el 3 de junio de 1463, en Riccarton, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Catherine Douglas, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sibilla Elizabeth Cathcart. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
